topic.constraint: Evaluate expected peak usage to ensure system capacity.
Determine the number of concurrent users to plan for load distribution.
Understand user distribution to optimize infrastructure placement.

topic.pattern: Implement systems that route requests efficiently.
Design systems that scale automatically based on demand.
Use queuing to manage request rates and prevent overloading.
Cache responses to reduce latency and improve performance.
Implement robust API techniques to handle failures gracefully.

topic.metric: Test response times under production load to ensure efficiency.
Verify model accuracy across different scaling scenarios.
Ensure consistent performance across various conditions.
Identify potential bottlenecks that could impact performance.
Explore opportunities for optimizing model performance.

topic.constraint: Integrate with existing enterprise systems.
Integrate with existing authentication providers.
Ensure seamless integration with databases.
Integrate monitoring tools for real-time insights.
Align with business applications to support workflows.
topic.pattern: Implement versioning to manage API changes.
Ensure backward compatibility for existing systems.
Design APIs to degrade gracefully under failure conditions.
Implement robust error handling mechanisms.
Manage request rates to prevent overloading.
Provide comprehensive API documentation.

topic.constraint: Establish reliable pipelines for training data.
Ensure smooth integration of knowledge bases.
Implement real-time data update mechanisms.
Verify data quality throughout the pipeline.
Ensure data consistency across systems.
Implement security measures to protect data integrity.

topic.metric: Define what "good" or "normal" performance looks like.
Establish clear performance metrics for updates.
topic.pattern: Use blue/green deployments for zero-downtime updates.
Implement canary releases for gradual rollouts.
Use rolling updates for continuous deployment.
topic.constraint: Maintain automated training pipelines for seamless updates.
Ensure continuous deployment processes maintain service availability.
Design comprehensive backup and restore procedures.
topic.pattern: Implement failover mechanisms for high availability.
topic.constraint: Standardize high availability across multiple zones.
Consider multi-region deployments based on business needs.
Develop specific plans aligned with recovery objectives.

topic.pattern: Implement automated alerts for anomalies or performance degradation.
topic.constraint: Scale automatically based on demand to optimize resource usage.
Design systems with self-healing capabilities for common issues.
Implement automated model retraining as new data becomes available.
Focus on high availability and disaster recovery capabilities.
topic.pattern: Implement geographic load distribution to optimize global traffic.
topic.constraint: Enable automatic failover to backup regions to minimize downtime.
Maintain full capacity in the primary region while keeping recovery regions at a minimal footprint.

topic.pattern: Synchronize training data, model artifacts, and configurations across regions.
topic.constraint: Utilize Amazon S3 Cross-Region Replication and AWS DataSync.
Verify consistent model versions and configurations globally.
Implement staged rollouts to validate stability before full regional promotion.

topic.pattern: Maintain a single source of truth while allowing regional overrides for specific customization.
topic.constraint: Implement automatic routing to alternative regions during high-demand periods or local outages.
Optimize cross-region communication using VPC Peering, Transit Gateway, and AWS PrivateLink.

topic.pattern: Configure roles and policies following the Principle of Least Privilege (PoLP).
topic.constraint: Ensure encryption in transit and at rest.
Implement comprehensive logging via AWS CloudTrail and Amazon CloudWatch.
Reduce latency by storing models closer to users via intelligent cache warming and invalidation.
Design components for Amazon CloudFront and AWS Wavelength (5G edge) deployments.

topic.metric: Measure end-to-end response times under various conditions.
Test maximum throughput by gradually increasing concurrent requests.
